revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Chinese Cultural Renaissance]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Chinese Cultural Renaissance]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Chinese Cultural Renaissance); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chinese_Cultural_Renaissance here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chinese_Cultural_Renaissance for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{talk page header}}

<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers -->
<!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:58, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1256433899 revision]) ==

{{WikiProject Sociology|importance=low|Social movements=yes}}
{{WikiProject Taiwan|importance=low}}
{{GOCE|user=Dhtwiki|date=November 7–9, 2024}}
}}
{{photo|in=Taiwan}}

== Proposed merge of [[Draft:Chinese Cultural Renaissance]] into [[Chinese Cultural Renaissance]] ==

Draft is partly a copy of article but also has additional sections that should be reviewed for possible inclusion. [[User:Robert McClenon|Robert McClenon]] ([[User talk:Robert McClenon|talk]]) 19:19, 15 June 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:58, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
